summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a blistering 1970 Dark Star and fierce Mason’s Children, with crystal‑clear tape quality.
review: Fans rave about the soaring Dark Star that ranks alongside the legendary 2/13/70 performance, calling it “truly stellar” and “beautiful.” The recording is praised as high‑quality (often described as a perfect tape copy), with only a minor cut noted during Mason’s Children, making this a must‑listen for 1970 Dead enthusiasts.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly positive reviews highlight an outstanding Dark Star and strong Mason’s Children performance, coupled with comments about excellent tape/soundboard quality; only a single minor recording flaw is noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers repeatedly mention crisp, high‑fidelity tape copy ("quality---10", "high qualilty copy"). One note of a brief cut during Mason’s Children but otherwise no issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviews focus on a single, soaring Dark Star and a fierce, brief Mason’s Children, indicating a show that delivered high‑energy peaks with superb playing throughout.
